# version

**Instance Property**

The version of the Live Photo to be requested.

## Declaration

```swift
var version: PHImageRequestOptionsVersion { get set }
```

## Discussion

Use this property to request a version of the Live Photo with or without adjustments. See [doc://com.apple.photokit/documentation/Photos/PHImageRequestOptionsVersion].

## Specifying Image Request Options

- **deliveryMode**: The requested Live Photo quality and delivery priority.

items.description: The requested Live Photo quality and delivery priority.
